// Generated by github.com/romshark/datapages. DO NOT EDIT.

// Package href provides generators for datastar anchor hypertext references.
// These references must be used in the templates.
package href

import (
	"strconv"
	"strings"
)

// Coord references /coord/{lat}/{$}
func Coord(lat float64) string {
	s_lat := strconv.FormatFloat(lat, 'f', -1, 64)
	var b strings.Builder
	b.Grow(
		len("/coord/") +
			len(s_lat) +
			len("/"),
	)
	b.WriteString("/coord/")
	b.WriteString(s_lat)
	b.WriteString("/")
	return b.String()
}
